2025 Louisiana Laws
Revised Statutes
Title 1 - General Provisions

Next

LOUISIANA REVISED STATUTES

TITLE 1 GENERAL PROVISIONS

CHAPTER 1. INTERPRETATION OF REVISED STATUTES


  • §1:1. Revised Statutes; how cited
  • §1:2. Revised Statutes not retroactive
  • §1:3. Words and phrases; how construed
  • §1:4. Unambiguous wording not to be disregarded
  • §1:5. Clerical and typographical errors
  • §1:6. Conflict in expression of figures and words
  • §1:7. Singular may denote plural
  • §1:8. One gender may denote others
  • §1:9. Use of disjunctive
  • §1:10. Person, defined
  • §1:11. Population, how determined; new census
  • §1:11.1. Special census
  • §1:12. Classification and arrangement of statutes; effect on construction
  • §1:13. Headings and ancillary information, not part of law
  • §1:14. References in Revised Statutes
  • §1:15. Repeal of law; effect
  • §1:16. Construction of Revised Statutes; continuation of existing institutions; effect on rights acquired, penalties imposed, etc.
  • §1:17. Transfer of functions; application of Revised Statutes
  • §1:18. Construction of laws relative to abortion

CHAPTER 2. MISCELLANEOUS

  • §1:50. Daylight saving time; conditions; adoption

CHAPTER 2. MISCELLANEOUS


  • §1:51. Acts and contracts in French language; effect
  • §1:52. Publication of advertisements, notices, etc., in English language
  • §1:53. Money accounts in dollars and cents
  • §1:54. Residence; forfeiture
  • §1:55. Days of public rest, legal holidays, and half-holidays
  • §1:55.1. Days of public rest; Juneteenth Day
  • §1:56. Doctors' Day
  • §1:57. Arbor Day
  • §1:58. My Nationality American Day
  • §1:58.1. National Airborne Day
  • §1:58.2. Juneteenth Day
  • §1:58.3. Ronald Reagan Day
  • §1:58.4. A day of remembrance; Hurricane Katrina and Hurricane Rita
  • §1:58.5. Care Enough to Wear Pink
  • §1:58.6. Purple Heart Recognition Day
  • §1:58.7. Louisiana Collector Car Appreciation Weekend
  • §1:58.8. Sarcoma Awareness Month
  • §1:58.9. Diffuse Intrinsic Pontine Glioma
  • §1:59. Definitions of mortgage, chattel mortgage and pledge to include security interests
  • §1:60. Timely filing of papers due; presumption
  • §1:61. Definition of disadvantaged business enterprise
